document_identity.principal_address: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

ad_fund_rate.name: Monthly Program Fee
ad_fund_rate.max_increase: Current rate + 1% of GRR over term

doubletree_suites_250_room.note: Cover page states high as $122,675,079 — $50K discrepancy

territory.description: Non-exclusive license at specified location. No protected territory. Franchisor may own/operate/franchise any business anywhere including competitive brands.
territory.encroachment_protection: None. No mechanism to resolve conflicts.

term_and_renewal.initial_term_coo: Remaining term or other approved term
term_and_renewal.renewal_mechanism: Re-licensing at franchisor's sole discretion. May require materially different terms.

termination.by_franchisee: Not authorized. Unilateral termination = material breach + liquidated damages.
termination.by_franchisor_without_cause: Condemnation or casualty (if franchisee elects not to rebuild)

liquidated_damages.post_opening_under_2_years: Greater of Hotel's or System's Avg Monthly x 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Avg Monthly x remaining months

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own or be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May own minority interest or be franchisee of competitor.

dispute_resolution.venue: U.S. District Court, E.D. Virginia (Alexandria), or state court in Fairfax County, VA, or New York, NY
dispute_resolution.puerto_rico_arbitration: AAA/JAMS, venue Fairfax County VA, seat New York NY

item19_financial_performance.disclosure_type: Room Rate, Occupancy, Occupancy Index, RevPAR Index
caveats: Only 32.4% of franchisee-managed hotels met or exceeded average room rate — significant skew
No cost build-up or profitability data disclosed
STR indices based on competitive sets selected by individual hotels (potential selection bias)
Excludes 2 (2024) and 3 (2023) franchisee-managed hotels with insufficient data from index calculations

key_observations: Licensing pass-through entity with ~99% operating margin
All assets pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (maturing 2025-2033)
Cash near zero — relies on Hilton centralized cash management
Termination fee revenue spiked 2024 ($18.3M vs $2.4M in 2023)
Graduate brand acquisition in 2024 added ~$85M franchise contract intangibles
No US income tax — treated as disregarded entity for tax purposes

pending_material: AAAA Property Partners v. HFH — breach of contract (franchise termination)
In re Extended Stay Hotel Antitrust (N.D. Cal.) — IDeaS RMS class action
Hanson Dai v. SAS Institute (N.D. Cal.) — IDeaS RMS class action
Ryan Segal v. Amadeus (N.D. Ill.) — Amadeus data sharing class action
Jeanette Portillo v. CoStar Group (W.D. Wash.) — STR data sharing class action
concluded_notable: Portland Hotel Ownership (Curio, $30M counterclaim): settled with mutual releases (Jul 2022)

management_requirements.competitor_restriction: Cannot be Competitor (owner/licensor/franchisor of competing brand). Management Company cannot be exclusive manager for Competitor.

special_features.eforea_spa: Optional spa franchise as addendum to hotel FA. $25,000 initial fee + 2% Gross Spa Revenue royalty.
special_features.restaurant_brands: Optional Restaurant Brand license ($47,500 initial + $14,500 annual, except Piebird). Brands: Spencer's, Poppy's, Haley & Bear, The Comeback, Che Vita, Magnolia Smokehouse & Kitchen.
special_features.development_incentive: Financial contribution at franchisor's discretion for new development/conversion. Not a loan, contingent liability. Repayable if terminated early or transferred.
special_features.advance_purchase_program: Optional program. 4.5% fee (currently waived for digital payments). Adyen merchant account required.

unresolveds.description: Exhibit D-4 (Restaurant Brand Amendment) listed in TOC but no cover page found
Exhibit H-3 (Restaurant Brands Manual TOC) listed in TOC but not found as standalone
Note 9 Subsequent Events date says 'March 18, 2024' — likely typo for March 18, 2025
Cover page states DoubleTree Suites high investment as $122,675,079 but Item 7 table totals $122,625,079 — $50K discrepancy
Jury waiver not confirmed from Item 17 summary — would need Exhibit D FA text review

contradictions.description: Cover page DoubleTree Suites high-end investment ($122,675,079) does not match Item 7 table total ($122,625,079) — $50,000 discrepancy
